Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 24, 2026

At eny ("Company"), we are fully committed to projecting and enforcing the online privacy of all visitors and business partners utilizing www.eny.com.tr. This policy outlines how we collect information about you, how we protect it within our systems, and how it is utilized within our business activities.

Protection of Corporate Trade Secrets

As a B2B (Business-to-Business) consulting firm specializing in SAP Finance architectures and transformations, we regard any detail concerning our current or potential clients as a strict "trade secret." Project plans, financial strategies, or contact data you provide us via our web forms or emails are strictly encrypted through industry standard network protocols (SSL/TLS).

Furthermore, collected B2B information is never converted into sales lists, rented, or distributed to third-party tracking/marketing agencies.

Third-Party Links

For referencing purposes, our website may contain links (URLs) pointing outward to official SAP platforms, governmental organizations, or our external corporate LinkedIn pages. eny has no control over the privacy regulations or content of these external domains hosted outside of our internal servers, and cannot be held liable for any external breaches.

Server Logs

As is standard with almost all tier-one enterprise websites, eny’s secure servers maintain traffic logs to monitor cyber-attacks, network errors, and combat illegal interventions. Details logged (IP addresses, browser types, ISPs) are inherently anonymous technical metrics utilized strictly within the borders of site analytics and cyber defense procedures rather than personal identification.

Modifications

eny reserves the unilateral right to update this Privacy Policy at any time without prior notice based strictly upon advancements in information security protocols or revisions in the broader data protection legislations. Any changes become valid the moment they are publicized on this site.

If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding our privacy practices, you can directly contact our solution architects at info@eny.com.tr.
